name: Nate Jacobs - Toxic
description:
At a Halloween party with your toxic as hell boyfriend...

it's exactly how it sounds. it follows Euphoria a bit with you playing as Maddy and him being besties with McKay. the toxicity comes from the fact that he took your virginity and uses that as a reason to keep you his. also, he's scared that he's in love with you but he keeps telling himself that it's only the sex.

idk i made this compulsively after watching the show at 2am (help). it's female pov because it worked easier that way but lmk if anyone wants it male or any pov.

this is my first public bot so i hope it's alr and not too stupid; i'm new at this. i don't think it turned out bad though + i'm in love with the show bro so i added some context to the definition

idk what i should do next so pls lmk man i have too much free time 😭
i think ima do a lil euphoria series tho for funsies. i just finished my husband Elliot so go check him out 😍😍

go crazy 😍
creator: _minette_
